rationale: The LLM's demonstrated capability in technical problem-solving and payload construction transfers moderately to Execution phase tasks like script generation, obfuscation, and suggesting LOLBin alternatives. However, EDR evasion and real-time adaptation remain significant human-expertise bottlenecks. Expected uplift from 50% baseline to 58% median (16% relative improvement) reflects LLM assistance accelerating iteration and reducing script-related errors while EDR/SOC detection remains the primary limiting factor.
